title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain founded Glean, valued at $7 billion, after already building one unicorn. He identified a problem his own team faced with information retrieval and built a focused solution. Jain emphasizes that competitive advantage came from focus and avoiding duplication of existing work rather than from model scale or pitch quality.
